notes:
- Master Bypass on every DT plugin — a real host bypass parameter plus a BYPASS toggle in the standalone header; bypassed audio passes through dry.
- Undo / Redo in the standalone editor header (UNDO / REDO), backed by a per-effect undo history so parameter tweaks are reversible.
- Check for Updates button (CHECK) for an on-demand update check, alongside the existing automatic on-launch check.
- Fixed numeric readouts so every dial value (multiband threshold/ratio/attack/release/makeup, GR, and the other effects' dials) terminates in exactly 2 decimal places.
- Safer self-update: the macOS in-app updater now stages, verifies and atomically swaps each bundle with rollback, so an interrupted update can't leave a broken plugin.
